executive_summary.state_snapshot: Planning layer complete. Comprehensive test plan created covering registration form validation, users listing display, and API endpoints. All requirements extracted and organized by functional area.
critical_findings: Registration form requires validation coverage for name, email, phone fields
Users listing table rendering and data persistence verification needed
API endpoints /register and /users require integration and error case testing
executive_summary.recommendation: Proceed to prioritization with risk-based ordering: API contract testing first, then UI form validation, followed by listing display verification.

artifacts_references.summary_md: Test plan structured in three areas: api.gherkin (POST /register, GET /users), registration.gherkin (form validation, field requirements), users_listing.gherkin (table rendering, pagination). All scenarios mapped to extracted dependencies.

delta_changes.rationale: Planning layer organized extracted requirements into executable test scenarios grouped by functional area, establishing clear test structure and dependencies for prioritization.

must_validate: Verify test scenario completeness for each functional area
Confirm dependency graph reflects actual test execution order
Validate that no requirements are unmapped
decision_points: Prioritization strategy: risk-based vs. coverage-based vs. dependency-ordered
Blocking test identification for phased rollout

if_gaps_found.action: Return for requirement gap analysis and specification

if_coverage_impossible.action: Request scope clarification or requirement adjustment

if_conflict_detected.conflict_resolution_strategy: Coordinator validates requirement consistency and coordinates re-planning if conflicts exist
